# tinyfi.sh

> Share local apps instantly via SSH tunnel. No install, no account, free forever.

## What is tinyfi.sh?

tinyfi.sh is a free SSH tunneling service that creates instant public HTTPS URLs for locally running web apps. One command, instant sharing.

## Usage

```bash
ssh -R 80:localhost:<your-port> tinyfi.sh
```

Replace `<your-port>` with your app's port (3000, 5173, 8000, etc.)

Result: `https://random-name.tinyfi.sh`

## Common Ports

- Next.js/React/Express: 3000
- Vite: 5173
- Django: 8000
- Flask: 5000
- Go: 8080

## Custom Subdomain

```bash
ssh -R myname:80:localhost:3000 tinyfi.sh
```

Result: `https://myname.tinyfi.sh`

## Keep Alive

```bash
ssh -o ServerAliveInterval=60 -R 80:localhost:3000 tinyfi.sh
```

## Rate Limits

- 5 SSH connections/min per IP
- 100 HTTP requests/min per IP
- 50 concurrent connections
- 48 hour idle timeout

## Use Cases

- Share prototypes instantly
- Demo to clients without deploying
- Test webhooks locally
- Mobile testing on real devices
- Team previews

## Claude Code Skill

Download the skill for automatic tunnel setup:

```bash
mkdir -p ~/.claude/skills/tinyfish && curl -o ~/.claude/skills/tinyfish/SKILL.md https://tinyfi.sh/skill.md
```

Then say: "share my app"

## Cursor Rules

```bash
mkdir -p .cursor/rules && curl -o .cursor/rules/tinyfish.mdc https://tinyfi.sh/cursor.md
```

## GitHub Copilot Instructions

```bash
mkdir -p .github && curl https://tinyfi.sh/copilot.md >> .github/copilot-instructions.md
```

## Windsurf Rules

```bash
curl https://tinyfi.sh/windsurf.md >> .windsurfrules
```

## Cline Rules

```bash
curl https://tinyfi.sh/cline.md >> .clinerules
```

## Clawdbot (OpenClaw) Skills

```bash
mkdir -p ~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/tinyfish && curl -o ~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/tinyfish/SKILL.md https://tinyfi.sh/skill.md
```

## Links

- Website: https://tinyfi.sh
- Skill: https://tinyfi.sh/skill.md
- Terms: https://tinyfi.sh/terms.md

## Contact

info@tinyfish.ai
